message:
⚡ Code-split CodeMirror into dedicated vendor chunk (#10198)

CodeMirror (@codemirror/*, @uiw/react-codemirror, @lezer/*) is only
used by the Drasi stream samples drawer. Move it out of the default
vendor chunk into codemirror-vendor so it only loads when needed.

Fixes #10199

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
